description.content:
HTTP query interface for Farcaster's Snapchain network. Read casts, reactions, follows, user data, verifications and on-chain events by FID; submit signed protobuf messages; and stream hub events. The public reference endpoint is hosted at https://snapchain.farcaster.xyz, but operators typically run their own Snapchain node and bind the HTTP server to a local port (default 3381).

Contact Support:
 Name: Farcaster
